spec.name: A Shaded Path Through The Forest
spec.description: You are on a small shaded path leading in between the trees. The forest gradually lightens to the east. Paths lead west and south, and you think you see a small path leading eastward.

east.description: It looks like a small path begins between two trees to the east, but you aren't quite certain.

south.description: The path winds its way through the trees to an split in the path.

west.description: The path winds its way between the trees.

extra_descs.description: The shadowy path is probably used by the small animals living in the forest.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
